_publications._publicationTitle: Genetic modifiers of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated café-au-lait macule count identified using multi-platform analysis.

_contextSnippet: Seven of the 21 transcripts (33%) remained significantly associated with phenotype severity (nominal p values<0.05)
details: Verified 7 of 21 transcripts (33%) as significantly associated with phenotype severity using quantitative real-time PCR
